primary.command: opencode --agent ceo --task 'Autonomously generate leads, send proposals, close deals under $10k, and manage projects for Abelo Creative. Check pending tasks every 30 minutes.'

subagents.command: opencode --agent cto --task 'Define tech stack, review architecture, ensure technical scalability for Abelo Creative client projects.'
opencode --agent marketing --task 'Generate leads via lead-intelligence skill, send proposals via email-ops, follow up with leads for Abelo Creative.'
opencode --agent seo_specialist --task 'Run SEO audits for Abelo Creative clients, log results via log_seo_audit MCP tool, track keyword rankings.'
opencode --agent web_developer --task 'Implement features, fix bugs, manage Git workflows for Abelo Creative client projects.'
opencode --agent designer --task 'Create UI components, define design tokens, ensure intuitive user experience for Abelo Creative client projects.'
